title: Rust lichen-oscore edhoc.rs: VecExt trait is private but useful
description: In rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs, a VecExt helper trait was added to provide push_err() and extend_err() methods that map heapless::Vec errors to EdhocError::BufferTooSmall. This pattern is useful but the trait is private to the module. Consider whether this pattern should be extracted to a shared utility module for reuse across other crates that use heapless::Vec.
